# AGATEX Fiber Solutions — Fiber Auxiliary Solutions

> AGATEX Fiber Solutions is the fiber-auxiliary business of AGATEX Feinchemie GmbH, an independent Austrian family-owned specialty-chemicals maker founded in 1921 (fifth generation). AGATEX develops, formulates and tests spin finishes, functional finishes and process chemistry for staple fibers and filament — tuned precisely to polymer chemistry, machine park and end application. Main focus: staple fiber for nonwovens and textiles; filament (POY/FDY/DTY) is served secondarily. All finishes are developed PFAS-free and silicone-free where possible; production runs on 100% renewable energy.

## Company
- Legal entity: AGATEX Feinchemie GmbH (brand: "AGATEX Fiber Solutions")
- Founded: 1921, Austria; independent family business, 5th generation, >80% equity ratio
- Headquarters: Aichham 11, 4650 Edt bei Lambach, Austria
- APAC production: AGATEX (Thailand) Co., Ltd., Prachinburi (commissioning 2026/2027); partner network in Malaysia
- Sustainability: PFAS-free, silicone-free, biodegradable systems; predominantly plant-based raw materials; 100% renewable energy in production
- Compliance: REACH, OEKO-TEX® Standard 100, GOTS, FDA 21 CFR, EU 10/2011
- In-house application lab: AGATEX Innovation Center (AIC)
- Website: https://www.agatex-fibers.com/  · Parent: https://www.agatex.at
- Contact (fiber sales): salesfc@agatex.at · +43 (7245) 32341-0 · APAC: apac@agatex.at
- Languages: German (default), English, Chinese

## What a spin finish (fiber preparation) does
Lubrication (fiber-fiber and fiber-metal friction), antistatic (charge dissipation), cohesion (fiber bundle/web integrity), wetting (hydrophilic or hydrophobic as required), thermal stability (no deposits on heaters/calenders/nozzles), low/clean residue, and regulatory compliance. Applied at the spin line and/or on the tow (kiss-roll, spray, finish bath).

## Products (three pillars)
### Spin Finishes & Hydrophilic Agents — LAMBAFIL®  (/spin-finishes.html)
Fiber preparations for synthetic, natural and high-performance fibers plus durable hydrophilic agents. The LAMBAFIL® series covers PET, recycled PET (rPET, PFAS-free), PP, PAN, wool and other natural fibers, PLA, durable hydrophilic finishing for hygiene topsheets (EDANA/INDA-compliant) and technical hydrophilic finishing.
### Functional Finishes — LAMBAPHOB® · LAMBAFELT® · CABERTEX®  (/functional-finishes.html)
LAMBAPHOB® hydrophobic finishing (PFAS-free, adjustable; contact angle >90°); LAMBAFELT® antistatic finishing; CABERTEX® halogen-free flame retardants (FMVSS302, EN 13501); LAMBAFIL® durable hydrophilic agents.
### Process Auxiliaries — LAMEX® · LAMBATOL®  (/process-auxiliaries.html)
LAMEX® defoamers & deaerators for spunlace high-pressure water loops (to ~250 bar) and finishing baths — silicone and silicone-free, effective at low dosage, low residue; LAMBATOL® wetting agents & emulsifiers (ionic and non-ionic; also washing auxiliaries).

## Fiber types served  (/fiber-types.html)
- Synthetic: PET, rPET, PP, PA (6/66), PAN, PE, bicomponent
- Natural: wool, cotton, hemp, flax, jute, PLA
- High-performance (sizing): carbon, glass (E-/C-glass), aramid, basalt
- Filament (secondary): POY, FDY, DTY — oil pick-up (OPU) governs texturing and machine cleanliness (LAMBAFIL® series)

## Applications (with matched products)
- Nonwoven Hygiene  (/app-hygiene.html) — topsheet/coverstock, wipes, medical nonwovens, diapers/incontinence → LAMBAFIL® spin finishes & hydrophilic agents, LAMEX® defoamer
- Nonwoven Technical  (/app-technical.html) — geotextiles, automotive nonwovens, filtration, building/insulation → LAMBAFIL®, LAMBAPHOB®, LAMBAFELT®, CABERTEX®, LAMEX®
- Nonwoven Agriculture  (/app-agriculture.html) — crop protection, mulch, seed cover, UV-stable agro nonwovens → LAMBAPHOB® (PFAS-free), LAMBAFIL®, LAMEX®
- Textile  (/app-textile.html) — staple yarn (ring & open-end spinning), technical textiles, apparel nonwovens, composite semi-finished → LAMBAFIL® spin finishes, LAMBAFELT® antistatics, LAMBATOL®

## Downstream processes
Carding, drawing, thermobonding, spunlace (hydroentanglement), needlepunch, ring & open-end (rotor) spinning; staple production = melt spinning → drawing → crimping → cutting.

## AGATEX Innovation Center (AIC)
In-house application lab: fiber carding (fiber-fiber/fiber-metal friction, dust/contaminant quantification), lab foulard, fiber sinking time (hydrophilic/hydrophobic level), nonwoven fluid-management testing (Lister/Wetback/Run-off per EDANA), analytics (HPLC/GC, Soxhlet % o.w.f., Zwick tensile). Result: shorter development cycles, fewer trials at the customer.

## Key terms
spin finish, fiber finish, fiber lubricant, primary/secondary spin finish, coning oil, staple fiber spin finish, nonwoven fiber finish, hydrophilic finish topsheet, durable / semi-durable / non-durable hydrophilic finish, multi-insult / strike-through / rewet (wetback) / run-off, ADL (acquisition distribution layer), coverstock, hydrophobic fiber finish, PFAS-free / fluorine-free (C0) water repellent vs. C6, antistatic agent fiber, halogen-free (P/N) flame retardant, LOI (limiting oxygen index), defoamer vs. deaerator for spunlace/nonwoven water loops, low-foam / APEO-free wetting agent, emulsifier, carbon/glass/aramid fiber sizing (silane coupling agent, film former, resin compatibility), POY/FDY/DTY texturing finish, oil pick-up (OPU), % o.w.f., biodegradable / silicone-free spin finish

## Key terms — Deutsch
Spinnpräparation, Präparationsmittel, Avivage, Faserhilfsmittel, Faseröl, Primär-/Sekundärpräparation, Spulöl/Zwirnöl, Hydrophilierungsmittel (dauerhaft/permanent), Rücknässung/Wetback, Flüssigkeitsdurchtritt, Hydrophobierung (PFAS-frei/fluorfrei), Antistatikmittel, halogenfreies Flammschutzmittel (P/N), Sauerstoffindex (LOI), Entschäumer/Entlüfter (silikonfrei, APEO-frei), Netzmittel/Benetzungsmittel, Emulgator, Faserschlichte/Schlichtemittel (Silan-Haftvermittler, Filmbildner), Faser-Metall-Reibung, Präparationsauflage

## Key terms — 中文
纺丝油剂, 化纤油剂, 短纤维油剂, 纤维油剂, 络筒油/二次上油剂, 亲水整理剂/亲水助剂 (耐久/持久), 面层/导流层(ADL)处理剂, 穿透时间/回渗, 无氟拒水剂/无PFAS拒水剂, 抗静电剂, 无卤阻燃剂(磷氮系), 极限氧指数(LOI), 消泡剂(水刺水循环)/脱泡剂, 无硅/无APEO消泡剂, 渗透剂/润湿剂, 乳化剂, 玻璃纤维浸润剂/碳纤维上浆剂/芳纶上浆剂 (硅烷偶联剂, 成膜剂), 上油率(OPU)
